topStories.title: Bid to remove CEC Gyanesh Kumar fails as Lok Sabha Speaker, Rajya Sabha Chairman reject notices
topStories.description: The process to remove a sitting CEC is similar to that of the removal of a judge of the Supreme Court or a high court. Individuals in these positions can only be removed from on the ground of 'proven misbehaviour or incapacity'.

topStories.title: Apple plans Supreme Court appeal in Epic Games App Store battle — again
topStories.description: Apple plans to ask the Supreme Court to review its App Store fight with Epic Games, as it challenges a ruling limiting its ability to charge fees on external payments.

dailyNews.title: A Look At Trump's Shifting War Timelines As 'Tuesday Final Deadline' Looms Over Iran
dailyNews.description: US President calls Tuesday the final deadline after multiple extensions, even as Iran rejects talks and Washington's 15-point proposal

dailyNews.title: ‘Take the oil because it’s there for the taking’, says Trump as he suggests use of military power to obtain Iran's oil
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) said that if it were up to him, he would have preferred using military power to take control of Iran's vast oil reserves, AP reported

dailyNews.title: After ICE detention, 5‑year‑old Liam Conejo Ramos suffers trauma and sees a psychologist, parents say
dailyNews.description: Liam Conejo Ramos, the five-year-old boy who was detained by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in January this year, reportedly fears being detained again. Sharing how their son has changed, his parents, in an interview, said that he is now seeing a psychologist regularly.

dailyNews.title: Live updates: Trump to address media as deadline looms for Iran on Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: With a military standoff intensifying and a critical deadline approaching, Trump’s address is likely to set the tone for the next phase of US action against Iran while also navigating political challenges at home. We’ll keep you updated with the latest developments as the event unfolds.

dailyNews.title: US Marshals Service granted exceptions for Musk’s DOGE security, waived training rules: Report
dailyNews.description: Recently disclosed government emails have now revealed that the US Marshals Service waived off requirements for Billionaire Elon Musk's security detail during his time at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)

dailyNews.title: Where are Iran’s power plants that Trump has threatened to destroy?
dailyNews.description: US President Trump threatens to destroy power plants, bridges by 8pm Tuesday if Iran doesn't open the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: In maps and photos: Five Iranian civilian bridges at risk of US strikes
dailyNews.description: A look at the multimillion-dollar mega structures that could be threatened by Trump's 'Bridge Day' ultimatum.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: Michael Korda's take on discipline and goals – ‘One way to keep momentum going is to have…’
dailyNews.description: Michael Korda reminds us that momentum is fragile and must be sustained through ever-evolving goals. Achievement isn’t the end but a stepping stone; without new challenges, motivation fades. Continuous ambition keeps progress alive and prevents stagnation.

dailyNews.title: Steve Bannon case: Supreme Court clears legal path for dismissal of charges linked to Capitol riot investigation
dailyNews.description: Both federal prosecutors and Bannon requested that the Supreme Court vacate a lower appeals court ruling that had upheld his conviction. They also asked that the case be sent back to a trial court with instructions to dismiss the original charges.

dailyNews.title: Tyler Robinson defense asks court to bar cameras for next in-person hearing
dailyNews.description: Accused Charlie Kirk assassin Tyler Robinson seeks to ban cameras from critical April 17 hearing as judge has yet to rule on electronic media access.

dailyNews.title: Trump touts airman rescue mission, boasts Iran could be 'taken out in 1 night'

dailyNews.title: White House Egg Roll for Easter features Trump family members amid festive celebration
dailyNews.description: President Trump and first lady Melania Trump hosted the White House Easter Egg Roll on the South Lawn of the White House, with patriotic and festive activities.

dailyNews.title: Top cops out: The attorney general firings and forced exits that made history
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi's exit is the latest in a long history of attorney general firings and resignations that shook Washington, from Nixon to Trump and beyond.

dailyNews.title: Top GOP defense voice breaks with invasion fears, says US can reopen Hormuz without ground war
dailyNews.description: Rep. Mike Turner says he doesn't think U.S. ground troops will be necessary to open the Strait of Hormuz amid Trump's escalating threats to Iran.

dailyNews.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
dailyNews.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s USAID Overhaul Sent Millions More Dollars to Big U.S.-Based Contractors
dailyNews.description: While organizations in the developing world were nearly shut out, the big aid agencies DOGE had called wasteful received huge infusions of cash, a new analysis found.

dailyNews.title: BNY and Robinhood Will Help Run ‘Trump Accounts’ for Children
dailyNews.description: The new tax-sheltered savings and investment accounts will start accepting deposits this summer.
